text: I find myself in a place defined by learning and innovation—the atmosphere is energetic but orderly. Observing the conference room with people attentively participating, I feel the hum of shared intellectual pursuit. Moving past the glass, I am welcomed by vibrant colors and the bold declaration of 'R+D', which for me, symbolizes endless possibility. Here, curiosity is king, and my mind feels awakened and keenly receptive. I am compelled both to observe and to contribute, part of something greater than myself—I am at home in this crucible of thought.
